# Obsidian Vaults Backup

This repository contains backups of multiple Obsidian vaults.

## Structure

```
.
├── Main/           # 主知识库
├── Work/           # 工作笔记
├── Personal/       # 个人笔记
└── OpenClaw/       # OpenClaw 专用
```

## Backup Schedule

- Daily backup at 02:00 AM (Asia/Shanghai)
- Incremental sync (only changed files)
